title: Acast API missing authorization error
symptom: When attempting to post a podcast to the Acast platform, the user receives a '400 - missing authorization' error message.
root_cause: The error occurs because the HTTP request to the Acast API lacks the necessary authorization header, which is required for authentication. This can happen if the API key is not correctly configured in the HTTP Request node settings.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Ensure the API key is added in the Authorization header
Retry the request to the Acast API
agent_instruction: Check and configure the Authorization header in the HTTP Request node with the correct API key.
